name: Explainability Framework for Policy-Aware Autonomous Agents
summary: arXiv:2607.21209v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: In the field of Artificial Intelligence, an agent is a system which is able to autonomously make decisions in order to reach a desired goal. As the...
description: arXiv:2607.21209v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: In the field of Artificial Intelligence, an agent is a system which is able to autonomously make decisions in order to reach a desired goal. As these systems grow more prevalent in our day-to-day lives, there has been an increased need to add explainability features which can provide an account for an agent's behavior. We therefore propose a fra...
author: Heather Merhout (Miami University), Daniela Inclezan (Miami University)
